2039567854568362235.full_text:
If you watched the LSG vs DC match, you might have noticed something interesting in the Hindi commentary. Anant Tyagi was on air when KL Rahul got out. A few overs later, when the replay of Rahul’s dismissal was shown, Tyagi, in a bit of haste, or perhaps unintentionally, said, “KL Rahul ki wicket ke liye Mohammad Shami ke hathiyaar ki zarurat padi.”

Right after saying this, Tyagi went completely silent for a few moments, seemingly realizing that the phrase could carry a double meaning. 😭😭

2039549644188066047.full_text:
🚨 Class of Hindi Commentators 🚨

Anant Tyagi:
“KL Rahul ki wicket ke liye Mohammad Shami ke hathiyaar ki jarurat padi.” 😭

Navjot Sidhu:
“Bakre ki maa kab tak khair manayegi, Cooker mein jaake seeti bajaayegi.” 😭
“Goli maari Ram ko, lagi Ghanshyam ko, mar gaya Tiwari.”
“Tere mooh me... ghee or shakkar dono ghuru.”

Akash Chopra:
“Rana ji maaf karna, galti mare se ho gayi”
“Andre andar, gend bahar.” 😭
